text:
Null, or a 5-digit numeric value 

COMMENT: Beginning with 2014 data, the NCPDP_ID is used in place of the CCW_PHARM_ID. Researchers who 
received CCW data from 2006–2013 and wish to identify the NCPDP_ID associated with the 
CCW_PHARM_ID may request the "Pharmacy Bridge File", which is designed for this purpose. 

This variable is populated by CCW by linking the service provider identification number from the 
source PDE to the proprietary National Council for Prescription Drug Programs
